concerns.text: FR-001 (compute thermodynamic descriptors) is mentioned in plan.md ('FR-001, FR-002: descriptor computation') but not explicitly addressed as a dedicated task or phase. It's implied by the 'compute descriptors' step, but a direct link would strengthen coverage.

Similar to FR-001, FR-002 (validate elemental symbols) is mentioned in plan.md ('FR-001, FR-002: descriptor computation') but lacks explicit task/phase linkage. It's part of the descriptor computation, but a direct tie is preferable.

FR-003 (train RF and GB classifiers) is addressed in plan.md ('models/train.py # FR-003'), but the link could be more explicit within the 'Phase' table. It's currently only present in the code comments.
FR-004 (evaluate performance) is addressed in plan.md ('models/evaluate.py # FR-004'), but similar to FR-003, the link is only in code comments and not directly in the Phase table.
FR-005 (feature importance) is addressed in plan.md ('models/importance.py # FR-005'), but the link is only in code comments and not directly in the Phase table.
FR-006 (class imbalance check) is mentioned in research.md but not explicitly linked to a task or phase in plan.md. The plan should indicate where this check is performed.
FR-007 (dataset sampling) is mentioned in plan.md ('Dataset sampled to ≤7 GB RAM') but lacks a direct link to a specific task or phase. It's a constraint, but should be tied to a step.
FR-008 (collinearity diagnostics) is mentioned in research.md but not explicitly linked to a task or phase in plan.md. The plan should indicate where this is performed.
FR-009 (filter compositions) is mentioned in research.md but not explicitly linked to a task or phase in plan.md. The plan should indicate where this is performed.
SC-001 (model performance metrics) is addressed in plan.md ('models/evaluate.py # SC-001'), but the link is only in code comments and not directly in the Phase table.
SC-002 (descriptor computation accuracy) is mentioned in research.md but not explicitly linked to a task or phase in plan.md. The plan should indicate where this is verified.
SC-003 (feature importance reproducibility) is addressed in plan.md ('models/importance.py # SC-003'), but the link is only in code comments and not directly in the Phase table.
SC-004 (training job completion time) is mentioned in plan.md ('≤6 hours total runtime') but lacks a direct link to a specific task or phase. It's a constraint, but should be tied to a step.
SC-005 (dataset memory footprint) is mentioned in plan.md ('Dataset sampled to ≤7 GB RAM') but lacks a direct link to a specific task or phase. It's a constraint, but should be tied to a step.
